name: HAIDER ALI
title: Cybersecurity Specialist
bio:
I specialize in cybersecurity, technology leadership, and software development. I'm passionate about identifying vulnerabilities, building secure systems, and transforming ideas into practical digital solutions.

As someone who enjoys continuous learning, I spend my time exploring emerging technologies, participating in cybersecurity challenges, and working on projects that create real world impact. I believe that great technology isn't just about innovation it's about security, reliability, and making a difference.
